intent: Displays important status feedback (success, warning, error) with optional title and description.

blacklist.description: Do not override padding and border-radius
Do not override semantic colors (controlled by variant)

aiPrompt: Use Alert from @/components/base for inline status feedback (success info, warnings, errors). Compose with AlertTitle + AlertDescription. Use variant="destructive" for errors. For blocking/confirm prompts use AlertDialog instead. Do not build banners with raw <div className="border bg-red-100">.

examples.title: Info alert with title + description
examples.snippet:
<Alert>
  <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>You can change your preferences in Settings.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>

examples.title: Destructive — failed action
examples.snippet:
<Alert variant="destructive">
  <AlertTitle>Save failed</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Check your network and try again.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
